description: Ring in the New Year with this classy happy New Year email template. The elegant black and gold colors set the stage for the best event, party or promotion that you plan to share with your audience. Customize with your brand logo, copy and quality images. Start designing your free happy new year email template right now.

designer.description: I’m an artisan user interface designer and front-end developer. I'm passionate about data visualization, user experience design and analytics interfaces. I enjoy solving complex problems that require a deep understanding of interface design, front-end development, and product management.
